name: Chuck Faranda Professional Reflection Nebula Workflow
description: Optimized for broadband reflection nebulae with emphasis on preserving delicate blue dust and subtle gradients.

steps.note: Crop only stacking artifacts; preserve faint reflection halos.
Remove pedestal carefully without clipping faint dust.
Preferred: AutoBGE. Alternatives: GraXpert AI or VeraLux Nox. Use conservative settings to preserve blue reflection dust and IFN.
Neutralize the background while preserving natural blue reflection tones.
Preferred: SPCC. Verify neutral stars and accurate blue reflection color.

Preferred: BlurXTerminator (10–20%) followed by NoiseXTerminator (very light). StarXTerminator is optional and generally not recommended unless processing stars separately. Alternatives: SyQon Parallax and SyQon Prism.
Preferred: Generalized Hyperbolic Stretch with small incremental stretches. Statistical Stretch for extremely faint dust.
Increase contrast gently; avoid oversaturating blue dust or clipping faint reflection.
Optional and minimal. Enhance texture only if it remains natural.
Archive a 16-bit TIFF master before export.

author: Chuck Faranda
